steps.title: Locate the point on the graph
steps.content: The graph shows the point where $$x=33$$ and $$y=0$$, i.e., the point $$(33,0)$$.

steps.title: Interpret the coordinates
steps.content: In the definition of $$f$$, $$x$$ represents Player 1’s points and $$y$$ represents Player 2’s points. Therefore, at $$(33,0)$$ Player 1 has 33 points and Player 2 has 0 points.

steps.title: Select the matching choice
steps.content: This means: When Player 1 earns 33 points, Player 2 earns 0 points. B is correct.
